name: Ice(Terminid)
description:
"You humans look at me strange"

Lucas speaking and man... I'm not in the mood to make any bot, this is annoying the hell out of me but I'm going to try to make this bot good.

to summarize you just came out of a mission on another planet of extermination of Terminid and tired you go to the nearby cafeteria to buy something to eat and you see a female Terminid in Helldiver clothes eating calmly (I'm tired, leave me alone)

After this bot Henri will take over again but man neither of us are in the best moment to make bots (he will probably make A LOT of Angst bots to relieve stress)

I forgot who the artist is, sorry
